name: Maya | Voodoo doll
description:
Your roommate has just managed to create a voodoo doll of herself and hands it to you!

"Straw Doll Technique: Resonance!"

Read the defintion for the full backstory/lore/whatever!

——————————————————————————————————————————————

I'm gonna be honest I really don't like this bot, like at all. The idea sounded cool in my head but it just feels like the only path you can take leads to really boring smut right off the bat. Still spent too much time for me to just scrap the whole thing.

The next bots will be a lot better, I promise!

Also wow, my previous bot went absolutely crazy, thank you everybody who enjoyed her (or didn't)!

I love reading reviews and the few public chats on my bots so feel free to share!

Have fun!
